productDisplayName: Nike Men T90 Shoot IV Hg-B Blue Sports Shoes
description: Style Note Get ready to score those fantastic goals in these nike Total 90 Shoot IV HG-B men's soccer cleats. Designed to provide you with superior traction, support and ball control, these soccer shoes are a hot favourite. Product Details Synthetic leather upper for lightweight comfort with uniform surface to facilitate shot accuracy at instep with an asymmetric lacing system for a snug Fit Textured screen on the upper to help spin the ball for swerve shot Appliquéd swoosh logo on the side Lightly cushioned collar for comfort and support EVA sockliner for lightweight cushioning and to reduce cleat pressure Lightweight outsole with optimized cleat placement for traction and stability Hard Ground cleats for enhanced support on hard courts Material and Care Synthetic Wipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dust Do not store in sunlight
